chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنْ تَزْوِيجِ النِّسَاءِ عِنْدَ بُلُوغِهِنَّ وَ تَحْصِينِهِنَّ بِالْأَزْوَاجِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – What is reckoned from the marriages of the women during their puberty, and fortifying them with the marriage

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/29)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/29)
text: مِنْ سَعَادَةِ الْمَرْءِ أَنْ لَا تَطْمَثَ ابْنَتُهُ فِي بَيْتِهِ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘From the happiness of the man is that his daughter (does not) experience (her first) menses in his house’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is of the good fortune of a man whose daughter does not experience Hayd (menses) in his home.’”
